Metadata.title: TrustFamily Relocation - Best Schools & Neighborhoods in Portugal
Metadata.description: Expert guide for family relocation to Portugal. Find top international schools and family-friendly neighborhoods.

Hero.title: Secure Your Children's Future in Portugal
Hero.subtitle: TrustFamily is the independent guide for international families relocating to Portugal. We compare every leading international school near Lisbon — IB, British, and American curricula at St. Julian's, TASIS Portugal, CAISL, and United Lisbon — map family-friendly neighborhoods in Cascais, Sintra, and Parque das Nações, and guide you step by step through D7, D8, and Golden Visa options. Two years of in-person school visits, 200+ families, no commercial relationships: the structured, honest research you need before you commit.

Pillars.introHeading: Three decisions that define your family's move to Portugal
Pillars.introBody: Which international school near Lisbon — IB, British, or American. Which neighborhood in Cascais, Sintra, or Parque das Nações. And how to navigate visas, housing, and timelines without costly mistakes. Each guide below is independent, built on data from 200+ families who made this move.
Pillars.educationDesc: Compare IB, British, and American curriculums with unbiased performance data.
Pillars.livingDesc: Find family-safe neighborhoods with optimized commutes to your chosen school.
Pillars.softLandingDesc: A complete integration system to help your children thrive from Day 1.
Pillars.softLandingTeaser: From the right visa to the right school and the right neighborhood — a complete, verified guide to moving your family to Portugal. Built on two years of research and the real experience of 200+ families.
